senses.gloss: who rides behind another on the same beast
Team B; the team that is secondary to the main team
one who rides behind another on the back of the same beast
a star rising in the east, when its opposite star is setting in the west
Team B; the team that is secondary to the main team

body.text: : (S, K:) the pl. (M, K) of the first (M) is
, (M, K, [in my copy of the Msb
, which is app. a mistranscription, and there said to be irreg.,]) or the pl. of
, (S, [so in both of my copies,]) and
is used as a sing., syn. with
, (T, K,) accord. to some, (T,) as well as pl. [thereof]: (K:) or it is pl. of
receptacle, in which a man puts his travellingprovisions;
any other thing that is conveyed behind a man on his beast;
A star rising in the east, when its opposite star is setting in the west.
A star facing a rising star:
(Lth, M, O, * K:) used in this sense by Ru-beh; who terms the rising star
One who brings his arrow after the winning of one of the players at the game called
of two of them, and asks them to insert his arrow among theirs:
[so in the M accord. to the TT, but app. a mistranscription,] signifies

one who brings his arrow after they have divided among themselves the slaughtered camel, and who is not turned back by them disappointed, but is assigned by them a portion of what has become their shares.

entries.lexicon_en: Al-Tahānawī, Kashshāf Iṣṭilāḥāt al-Funūn wa-l-ʿUlūm (d. 1777 CE)
entries.body_html:
رديف المعنيين:
[في الانكليزية] Syllepsis
[ في الفرنسية] Syllepse

هو عند الشعراء: أن يكون لفظ الرّديف له معنيان تامان ومفيدان. مثاله ما ترجمته:
ليطر سهمك كالنّسر حتى يدع العنقاء لا عمل لها وليطر كالببّغاء قلمك حتى يصير الطاوس مربيا للروح لفظ پركم له معنيان. 1 - عاطل عن العمل والثاني: ريشه قليل والطاوس العزيز صاحب ريش أو مربيا للروح. كذا في مجمع الصنائع. والمقصود هنا لفظپرور الذي هو رديف وجان قافية.
